title: cydonia oblonga var. pyriformis
intro: Cydonia oblonga var. pyriformis, also known as the Quince variety, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Rosaceae family and is native to Europe and Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues such as digestive problems and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Quince include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Quince is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed on their own or added to other recipes to reap its medicinal benefits.
